https://www.cedd.gov.hk/eng/events-publicity/ceremonies/index-id-209.html
CEDD Signed Contract for Free-flow Tolling System in Hong Kong – Development of Backend System
15/01/2021
The Civil Engineering and Development Department signed a contract of about HK$59 million on 15 January 2021 with Autotoll Limited for developing the Backend System of the Free-flow Tolling System in Hong Kong.
The project includes design, supply, delivery, installation, testing and commissioning for the Backend System serving the Free-flow Tolling System at government tolled roads/tunnels as specified, and other related services; and three-year Backend System expansion works.
The project commenced on 15 January 2021 for completion in 2025.

quote.msg: autotoll 要執笠了?

https://www.cedd.gov.hk/eng/events-publicity/ceremonies/index-id-209.html
CEDD Signed Contract for Free-flow Tolling System in Hong Kong – Development of Backend System
15/01/2021
The Civil Engineering and Development Department signed a contract of about HK$59 million on 15 January 2021 with Autotoll Limited for developing the Backend System of the Free-flow Tolling System in Hong Kong.
The project includes design, supply, delivery, installation, testing and commissioning for the Backend System serving the Free-flow Tolling System at government tolled roads/tunnels as specified, and other related services; and three-year Backend System expansion works.
The project commenced on 15 January 2021 for completion in 2025.

quote.msg: autotoll 要執笠了?

https://www.cedd.gov.hk/eng/events-publicity/ceremonies/index-id-209.html
CEDD Signed Contract for Free-flow Tolling System in Hong Kong – Development of Backend System
15/01/2021
The Civil Engineering and Development Department signed a contract of about HK$59 million on 15 January 2021 with Autotoll Limited for developing the Backend System of the Free-flow Tolling System in Hong Kong.
The project includes design, supply, delivery, installation, testing and commissioning for the Backend System serving the Free-flow Tolling System at government tolled roads/tunnels as specified, and other related services; and three-year Backend System expansion works.
The project commenced on 15 January 2021 for completion in 2025.
